creator: mi@aldan.ziplink.net
text:
lmbench-1.1 dies trying to figure out machine's memory
	parameters -- first, it asks for the raw disk device. Second
	-- for the size of RAM to be used by RAM-related benchmarks.
	Whatever you answer -- I tried 128, 32, and the default
	16, the ``memsize'' binary segfaults.  The configuration
	script gets the syntax error then.

Fix: 

Not sure yet...
How-To-Repeat: 
	See above.
